roa.docketEntryComment: MOT TO REFER FOR TREATMNT - ALTERNATIVE PROGRAMS FILED
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:01-25-08/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/S9/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/

/X:COURT GRANTS THE DEFT'S MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/X:DEFT TO COMPLETE THE REMAINING SIX MONTHS IN THE SALVATION ARMY PROGRAM/X:RELEASEABLE ONLY TO A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE SALVATION ARMY PROGRAM/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM SUCCESSFULLY, THEN DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE THE TIME IN CUSTODY,  THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT RECEIVE ANY CREDITS FOR THE TIME IN THE PROGRAM/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:96/DNA/RESTV/WS/RX/SA1:ASASMITH & CHRISTINE GALLAGHER/SA2:761 TEHAMA ST,, SF/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/
/CAL:SENTENCING/CONTD:SENTENCING OR MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/X:THE COURT APPOINTS CONFLICT ATTORNEY DAVID HARRISON FOR THE LIMITED PURPOSE OF ADDRESSING THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA/DOP/
/CAL TS APD MTR/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA 01-25-08/REIN ORIGTC/PROB MOD/PJ 90 DAYS/ADDL CTS 43/SWAP/OR/PROB EXT 06-13-09/
